_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of instructional design and evaluation models (e.g., ADDIE, Smith/Ragan model, Gagne’s Events of Instruction, Kirkpatrick’s model of evaluation).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, instructional design methods, knowledge retention research, and blended learning delivery models.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-002 (RM, cosine: 0.444), AI-S-008 (AI, cosine: 0.433).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.2/10 (raw 0.615). Shared vocabulary: [design, instructional, knowledge, models]. DCWF-only terms [addie, evaluation, events, gagne, instruction, kirkpatrick] vs WIDAI-only terms [adult, blended, delivery, learning, methods, objectives] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.858, R=0.892). R exceeds P by 0.034 — the WIDAI KSA's 20 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 19 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of instructional design and evaluation models (e.g., ADDIE, Smith/Raga" and "Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, in" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.590 ≈ STS 0.615 (gap 0.025). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [design, instructional, knowledge, models] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 21.4%. Shared tokens: [design, instructional, knowledge, models]. DCWF-only: [addie, evaluation, events, gagne, instruction, kirkpatrick]. WIDAI-only: [adult, blended, delivery, learning, methods, objectives].
